---
title: "test_multiplexed_project"
author:
- name: Testy McUser
  affiliation: 
  - Unemployed
date: '`r format(as.Date("2026-01-01"), "%B %d, %Y")`'
output:
  rmdformats::downcute:
    highlight: textmate
    code_folding: hide
    toc_depth: 3
    css: custom.css
---


This page serves as a starting point for exploring the results of `scprocess`. The links below organize all generated reports, with each one detailing a specific step of the analysis (e.g., mapping, ambient RNA removal, QC).

Use this page to navigate through the full set of visualizations and outputs for your project.

## Core steps

- Mapping ([link](test_mapping.html))
- Demultiplexing ([link](test_demultiplexing.html))
- Ambient RNA removal ([link](test_ambient.html))
- QC ([link](test_qc.html))
- Highly variable genes ([link](test_hvgs.html))
- Integration ([link](test_integration.html))
- Marker genes ([link](test_marker_genes_0.2.html))







## Config files


<details closed>
<summary>▸ *config-test_multiplexed_project.yaml* (click to expand)</summary>

```yaml
project:
  proj_dir: /pmount/projects/site/pred/neurogenomics/users/macnairw/test_multiplexed_project
  fastq_dir: data/fastqs/rna
  full_tag: test_multiplexed_project
  short_tag: test
  your_name: Testy McUser
  affiliation: Unemployed
  sample_metadata: data/metadata/multiplexed_test_project_metadata.csv
  ref_txome: mouse_2024
  date_stamp: "2026-01-01"
multiplexing:
  demux_type: hto
  fastq_dir: data/fastqs/hto
  feature_ref: data/metadata/multiplexed_test_project_feature_ref.csv
qc:
  qc_max_mito: 0.1
  qc_min_splice: 0.10
  qc_max_splice: 0.99
```

</details>
